steps.title: Locate the relevant table cell
steps.content: From the table, the cell at row Hybrid and column Priced at no more than \$25,000 shows 2 cars. The total number of cars is 14.

steps.title: Calculate the probability
steps.content:
There are 2 favorable cars out of 14 total cars, so the probability is:
$$\frac{2}{14} = \frac{1}{7}$$
This is a probability, so it must be written as the favorable count divided by the total count. That is the correct answer.
